metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4875
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 4: Immunoelectron microscopic detection of double immunogold labeling by antisera against VGLUT1 and Gβ2 (GNB2) showed localization of both to synaptic vesicles.. Experimental description: M&M: "Deeply anesthesized rats were sacrificed by decapitation. The cerebellar cortex was immediately removed and cut into small cubes of about 8 mm3"

antibody:
"The following rabbit polyclonal antisera against G-protein subtypes were used: ... Gβ2 (AS 36; Hinsch et al., 1989) ... All G-protein subtype-specific antisera were characterized for immunocytochemistry with respect to specificity and crossreactivity (Brunk et al., 1999; this paper)."
